channel.title: Project & Internships on ALARAN IBRAHIM
channel.description: Recent content in Project & Internships on ALARAN IBRAHIM

item.title: PROJECT 3 (web scraping): RAPE NEWS WEB-SCRAPER BOT
item.description: No doubt, the major challenge of data oriented professions in third world countries is lack of a reliable & democratic central database. Nigeria for example is yet to solve this problem fully. However, Data professionals need to collect data on their own, whether by traditional method or data mining. As we all know: DATA IS LIFE WEB SCRAPING PROCESS So what is with RAPE NEWS? Few weeks ago, a friend messaged me that he need a web-scraper for his project, he actually needs to get data on popular sites in Nigeria on rape cases during the lockdown (march - Septemeber 2020).

item.title: PROJECT 4 (automation) : AUTOMATING OFFICE BORING STUFFS
item.description: NOTE: I wrote this script based on my PC screen resolution(1366 x 768), so dont run it without using a compatible screen resolution or better still, adjust the code to fit your size. No doubt, repeating tasks in our office can be monotonous at times, It’s normal as we are humans, and not built to be repetitive This is not the case with bots, they can do our repetitive tasks without getting tired (there may be other reasons but tired is not one of them)

item.title: PROJECT 5 (Multi-cloud Integration): ETL PIPELINE CLOUD INTEGRATION OF PYSPARK WITH AWS AND GCS
item.description: Why Multi-cloud? The answer is Stability and Cheaper price. What do I mean by stability? Few years ago AWS which is known as the backbone of the internet was down for some minutes, Imagine the loss and inconvenience. Also, using all services of a particular cloud service provider is costly (although more scalable). Which is why “You shouldn’t put all your eggs in one basket” Dont put all your eggs in a single basket So I demonstrated how to build a simple ETL pipeline by using pyspark (spark SQL) with AWS (S3,RDS) and GCS (cloud storage, SQL) No bad feelings for Azure, but I just have to focus on the biggest two.

item.title: PROJECT 6 (computer vision) :DIAGNOSIS OF BREAST CANCER WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
item.description: NOTE; The project is aimed at using histological features, CNN and classifiers, currently anatomical features is been used, The page will be updated as soon as the project is completed. Breast cancer is the second most common cancer among women in the United States and the leading cancer type in Nigeria ([Source](https://www.cdc.gov/cancer/breast/statistics/index.htm , Source. However, it can be prevented or managed by early diagnosis. Radiography and Palpation (observation) are the common method in 3rd world countries like Nigeria and other African countires.

item.title: PROJECT 8 (NLP): BUILDING CHAT_BOT FOR CUSTOMERS SERVICE
PROJECT 2 (analytics): SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF SHOPRITE on Twitter
item.description: Word-cloud of shoprite-related tweets Sentiment-Analysis INTRODUCTION As the saying goes ‘Customer is King’ , hence it’s paramount to put the client first, and try as much as possible to seek and understand there opinion about a product or service. This project is aimed at analyzing: Tweeps (twitter user’s) emotion about shoprite Most occurring words in tweets Top Tweeps on ShopRite trend table.

item.title: PROJECT 1 (time-series):PREDICTING UNEMPLOYMENT RATE IN OSUN STATE
item.description: Freedom park, Osogbo (2020) This project is aim at solving problems & getting insights indigenous to my country Nigeria, Osun state to be precise. I initially used a linear regression model, but since I am now with more skills, I have choosen to use FbProphet model(Time_series_analysis) Although, there is a challenge of a reliable central data in Nigeria, I was able to scrap data from opendataforafrica.org using pandas library.

item.title: MY INTERNSHIPS (virtual)
item.description: 1) Data Analytics Intern @ QUANTIUM Date:Oct 2020 – Dec 2020 Data Preparation Customer Analytics Experimentation & uplift testing Analytics & Commercial Application Certification 2) Data Analytics virtual @KPMG Date:Dec 2020 – Jan 2021 Data Quality Assessment Data Insights Data Insights and Presentation Certification 3) Data Science and Advanced Analytics @ BCG GAMMA Date: Jan 2021 – March 2021 Business Understanding & Problem Framing Exploratory Data Analysis & Data Cleaning Feature Engineering Modeling & Evaluation Insights & Recommendation Certification
